languages.text: "Как только вы оправитесь, я молю вас найти меня на мостике — произошла катастрофа, Нунциус перестал говорить! Генетор Ферренц вызвался посодействовать в осмотре дражайшего коллеги, после чего набрался дерзости заявлять, что тот абсолютно исправен".

"Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"
languages.original_text: "Как только вы оправитесь, я молю вас найти меня на мостике — произошла катастрофа, Нунциус перестал говорить! Генетор Ферренц вызвался посодействовать в осмотре дражайшего коллеги, после чего набрался дерзости заявлять, что тот абсолютно исправен".

traits.locale_text: "Once you are restored to health, I beg of you to meet me at the bridge. A disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

"Once you are restored to health, I beg of you to meet me at the bridge. A disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

"Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

"Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

"Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

"Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

languages.text: "Sobald Eure Gesundheit widerhergestellt ist, kommt bitte zu mir auf die Brücke ... eine Katastrophe ist eingetreten: Nuncius spricht nicht mehr! Genetor Ferrenz hat sich bereit erklärt, meinen geschätzten Kollegen zu inspizieren, und wagt es, mir zu versichern, er wäre voll funktionsfähig.
languages.original_text: "Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

traits.locale_text: "Sobald Eure Gesundheit widerhergestellt ist, kommt bitte zu mir auf die Brücke ... eine Katastrophe ist eingetreten: Nuncius spricht nicht mehr! Genetor Ferrenz hat sich bereit erklärt, meinen geschätzten Kollegen zu inspizieren, und wagt es, mir zu versichern, er wäre voll funktionsfähig.

languages.text: « Une fois que vous aurez pris un peu de repos, je vous en conjure, retrouvez-moi sur la passerelle... Une catastrophe s'est produite : Nuncius ne parle plus ! Le genetor Ferrenz s'est porté volontaire pour examiner mon très estimé collègue et a ensuite eu le culot d'affirmer qu'il était parfaitement fonctionnel ! »
languages.original_text: "Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

traits.locale_text: « Une fois que vous aurez pris un peu de repos, je vous en conjure, retrouvez-moi sur la passerelle... Une catastrophe s'est produite : Nuncius ne parle plus ! Le genetor Ferrenz s'est porté volontaire pour examiner mon très estimé collègue et a ensuite eu le culot d'affirmer qu'il était parfaitement fonctionnel ! »

languages.text: “等您康复后，请务必到舰桥来找我。出了一件大事——努恩修斯不说话了！基因士费伦茨主动提出要检查我那尊敬的同僚，结果却厚颜无耻地声称他功能完全正常！”
languages.original_text: "Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

traits.locale_text: “等您康复后，请务必到舰桥来找我。出了一件大事——努恩修斯不说话了！基因士费伦茨主动提出要检查我那尊敬的同僚，结果却厚颜无耻地声称他功能完全正常！”

languages.text: «Una vez vuelva a encontrarse bien, le ruego que se reúna conmigo en el puente. Se ha producido un desastre; ¡Nuncius ha dejado de hablar! El genetor Ferrenz se presentó voluntario para inspeccionar a mi querido colega, ¡y ahora se atreve a afirmar que funciona con total normalidad!».
languages.original_text: "Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

traits.locale_text: «Una vez vuelva a encontrarse bien, le ruego que se reúna conmigo en el puente. Se ha producido un desastre; ¡Nuncius ha dejado de hablar! El genetor Ferrenz se presentó voluntario para inspeccionar a mi querido colega, ¡y ahora se atreve a afirmar que funciona con total normalidad!».

languages.text: 「健康を取り戻されたら、どうかブリッジで私に会ってください――災厄が起きたのです。ヌンキウスが口をきかなくなった！ジェネター・フェレンツが私の尊き同僚を検めると申し出たのですが、あろうことか今や、彼は完全に機能していると断言する始末なのです！」
languages.original_text: "Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

traits.locale_text: 「健康を取り戻されたら、どうかブリッジで私に会ってください――災厄が起きたのです。ヌンキウスが口をきかなくなった！ジェネター・フェレンツが私の尊き同僚を検めると申し出たのですが、あろうことか今や、彼は完全に機能していると断言する始末なのです！」

languages.text: "Sağlığınıza kavuştuğunuzda köprüde görüşelim. Bir felaket oldu: Nuncius konuşmayı bıraktı! Genetör Ferrenz, değerli meslektaşımı incelemeye gönüllü oldu ancak onun tamamen işlevsel olduğunu iddia ediyor!"
languages.original_text: "Once you are restored to health, I beg you to meet me on the bridge — a disaster has struck: Nuncius has stopped speaking! Genetor Ferrenz volunteered to inspect my esteemed colleague, yet he now dares to assert that he is fully operational!"

traits.locale_text: "Sağlığınıza kavuştuğunuzda köprüde görüşelim. Bir felaket oldu: Nuncius konuşmayı bıraktı! Genetör Ferrenz, değerli meslektaşımı incelemeye gönüllü oldu ancak onun tamamen işlevsel olduğunu iddia ediyor!"
